summary: Iteration 65: Validated 429 rate limiting fix and CSS recovery mechanisms. CRITICAL TEST PASSED: Desktop and mobile load back-to-back with no flash of unstyled content. Inline critical CSS (#050505 dark background, sr-only rules) present in page source. CSS chunks load successfully. All 12 key pages navigate correctly. Hero animations working on /solutions, /project-builder, /about, /experience-centre. Admin login works with admin/lexa2026. API endpoints return 200.

429_rate_limiting_fix.desktop_load: PASS - Homepage loads with dark theme, hero visible, all styling applied
429_rate_limiting_fix.mobile_load_immediately_after_desktop: PASS - No unstyled flash, CSS chunks loaded, mobile tab bar visible
429_rate_limiting_fix.inline_critical_css: PASS - Found in page source: #050505 background, sr-only rules, css_retry script
429_rate_limiting_fix.css_recovery_script: PASS - checkCSS() function present in page source
429_rate_limiting_fix.console_429_errors: NONE - No 429 errors observed in console

hero_animations./solutions: PASS - hero-animate-badge, title, desc classes present and working
hero_animations./project-builder: PASS - ALL 4 animation classes working (badge, title, desc, cta)

features_tested.broken_image_icons: NONE - No broken image icons visible in hero sections
features_tested.admin_login: PASS - admin/lexa2026 credentials work, redirects to /admin/dashboard
features_tested.mobile_tab_bar: PASS - Visible at bottom with HOME, BUILDER, PROJECTS, SERVICES, CONTACT

layout.tsx.inline_critical_css_lines_80-89: VERIFIED - Dark background (#050505), sr-only rules, header fixed positioning
layout.tsx.css_recovery_script_lines_91-125: VERIFIED - checkCSS() function, sessionStorage retry mechanism, chunk error handler

next.config.js.webpack_chunk_optimization_lines_140-158: VERIFIED - minSize 80KB, maxSize 500KB, maxInitialRequests 12, vendor-ui chunk merge

globals.css.broken_image_css_lines_377-380: VERIFIED - img[alt=''] { color: transparent; } rule present

context_for_next_testing_agent: 429 rate limiting fix validated. Inline critical CSS ensures dark background even if CSS chunks fail. CSS recovery script does automatic reload if CSS not loaded. Webpack optimization merged framer-motion + lucide-react + radix-ui into vendor-ui chunk. All pages load correctly. No broken images. Admin login works.
